tools.name: validateStrategy
tools.description: Parse and type-check a strategy spec without running it. Returns parsed predicates or the first error.

tools.name: runStrategy
tools.description: Execute a strategy live. Scans, filters, enters, and watches exits until durationSec or sessionSpendCapSol is hit. Pass simulate:true for a dry-run that skips signing.

tools.name: backtestStrategy
tools.description: Replay a strategy against historical token trade history. No signing, no RPC. Returns per-trade PnL and aggregate stats (win rate, total return, max drawdown).

mints.description: Mints to replay; defaults to scan.mints.

sinceMs.description: Only consider trades after this unix-ms cutoff.
